title: lindsaea interrupta
intro: Lindsaea interrupta is a species of fern belonging to the genus Lindsaea, commonly known as the interrupted lindsaea or interrupted tree fern. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea interrupta include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lindsaea interrupta involve boiling the plant's rhizome and roots to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
